response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (The video contains Mori Calliope's spoken-word stream update, which is entirely in English). 2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed and translated the English dialogue manually since the lyrics reference JSON was null. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the subtitles tightly to Mori Calliope's rapid speech and natural pauses to avoid any cascading delay.

subtitles.original: Moves! Ooh, so scandalous!
subtitles.english: Moves! Ooh, so scandalous!

subtitles.original: Ah, don't look!
subtitles.english: Ah, don't look!

subtitles.original: The physics are crazy!
subtitles.english: The physics are crazy!

subtitles.original: How about those weird cats though, doing the dance?
subtitles.english: How about those weird cats though, doing the dance?

subtitles.original: It was so cute, the creature. Nice moves, thank you.
subtitles.english: It was so cute, the creature. Nice moves, thank you.

subtitles.original: Thank you, Dead Beats. Whew!
subtitles.english: Thank you, Dead Beats. Whew!

subtitles.original: Oh, that was fun. That was fun, Dead Beats.
subtitles.english: Oh, that was fun. That was fun, Dead Beats.

subtitles.original: I had such a good time with you guys today.
subtitles.english: I had such a good time with you guys today.

subtitles.original: Actually, I mentioned to you guys my family...
subtitles.english: Actually, I mentioned to you guys my family...

subtitles.original: My family came to glorious Nippon!
subtitles.english: My family came to glorious Nippon!

subtitles.original: And actually, we kind of celebrated the release together.
subtitles.english: And actually, we kind of celebrated the release together.

subtitles.original: I was, like, sneaking around some places that were selling the album...
subtitles.english: I was, like, sneaking around some places that were selling the album...

subtitles.original: ...and then hearing my own music blasting on the speakers.
subtitles.english: ...and then hearing my own music blasting on the speakers.

subtitles.original: They were playing 'Orpheus',
subtitles.english: They were playing 'Orpheus',

subtitles.original: they were playing... uh, 'Golden Balance', they were playing 'Let's Just Crash'.
subtitles.english: they were playing... uh, 'Golden Balance', they were playing 'Let's Just Crash'.

subtitles.original: And for the first time ever,
subtitles.english: And for the first time ever,

subtitles.original: Dead Beats, walking around the store, I didn't feel like...
subtitles.english: Dead Beats, walking around the store, I didn't feel like...

subtitles.original: ...embarrassed.
subtitles.english: ...embarrassed.

subtitles.original: Which is a step in the right direction.
subtitles.english: Which is a step in the right direction.

subtitles.original: I feel like I've been getting better.
subtitles.english: I feel like I've been getting better.

subtitles.original: Dead Beats, I hope it was fun. It was so fun.
subtitles.english: Dead Beats, I hope it was fun. It was so fun.

subtitles.original: Dead Beats, I can't even explain...
subtitles.english: Dead Beats, I can't even explain...

subtitles.original: ...being able to be so proud and say, 'Look, that's my thing, they're playing my song
subtitles.english: ...being able to be so proud and say, 'Look, that's my thing, they're playing my song

subtitles.original: on the speaker.' It's so cool.
subtitles.english: on the speaker.' It's so cool.

subtitles.original: I mean, I went to karaoke with my little sister.
subtitles.english: I mean, I went to karaoke with my little sister.

subtitles.original: She told me that 'Die for You' was her favorite song of mine,
subtitles.english: She told me that 'Die for You' was her favorite song of mine,

subtitles.original: and 'Meta Meta', which made me very happy.
subtitles.english: and 'Meta Meta', which made me very happy.

subtitles.original: Those are her little sister reap favorites, and I sang...
subtitles.english: Those are her little sister reap favorites, and I sang...

subtitles.original: I sang it for her and her friends because they really wanted to hear,
subtitles.english: I sang it for her and her friends because they really wanted to hear,

subtitles.original: and they were like, 'Woah, free concert!'
subtitles.english: and they were like, 'Woah, free concert!'

subtitles.original: It was really cool.
subtitles.english: It was really cool.

subtitles.original: So yeah, there was that.
subtitles.english: So yeah, there was that.

subtitles.original: What else did I want to talk about?
subtitles.english: What else did I want to talk about?

subtitles.original: I feel like, even today with today's show,
subtitles.english: I feel like, even today with today's show,

subtitles.original: I feel like I'm getting more confident to do more things with my voice,
subtitles.english: I feel like I'm getting more confident to do more things with my voice,

subtitles.original: and I can do more things with my voice.
subtitles.english: and I can do more things with my voice.

subtitles.original: It's still a little rough and unpolished, but like, that's the point of Disaster-Piece
subtitles.english: It's still a little rough and unpolished, but like, that's the point of Disaster-Piece

subtitles.original: in general, right?
subtitles.english: in general, right?

subtitles.original: I'm working towards my masterpiece.
subtitles.english: I'm working towards my masterpiece.

subtitles.original: And maybe, um, it will take some time to get things exactly the way that I want.
subtitles.english: And maybe, um, it will take some time to get things exactly the way that I want.

subtitles.original: Maybe I'll never get there, you know? But...
subtitles.english: Maybe I'll never get there, you know? But...

subtitles.original: ...I'm doing more with my voice, and even though it's new stuff and it needs polishing,
subtitles.english: ...I'm doing more with my voice, and even though it's new stuff and it needs polishing,

subtitles.original: um, I'm really happy with it.
subtitles.english: um, I'm really happy with it.

subtitles.original: 'What's my favorite song?' ask the Dead Beats.
subtitles.english: 'What's my favorite song?' ask the Dead Beats.

subtitles.original: Oh... I don't know, I like them for different reasons.
subtitles.english: Oh... I don't know, I like them for different reasons.

subtitles.original: The one that maybe I'm proudest of is maybe 'Rivals and Equals',
subtitles.english: The one that maybe I'm proudest of is maybe 'Rivals and Equals',

subtitles.original: because I still... I listen to that and I'm like, 'Yeah, that's really good.'
subtitles.english: because I still... I listen to that and I'm like, 'Yeah, that's really good.'

subtitles.original: But then I also really like 'Shut In' for the lyrics as well.
subtitles.english: But then I also really like 'Shut In' for the lyrics as well.

subtitles.original: ...probably my favorite lyrics I've written in a long time.
subtitles.english: ...probably my favorite lyrics I've written in a long time.

subtitles.original: Yeah, that's right. That Dead Beat says, 'It's about the journey.' Exactly.
subtitles.english: Yeah, that's right. That Dead Beat says, 'It's about the journey.' Exactly.

subtitles.original: I'm running out of time here, so let me get this jidori camera really quick, hold on.
subtitles.english: I'm running out of time here, so let me get this jidori camera really quick, hold on.

subtitles.original: Ah, yes. My eyes are glowing in the dark right now,
subtitles.english: Ah, yes. My eyes are glowing in the dark right now,

subtitles.original: because we're in a dark area. But now I'm going to show you the skirt...
subtitles.english: because we're in a dark area. But now I'm going to show you the skirt...

subtitles.original: ...let's get on the red. Can I get on the red?
subtitles.english: ...let's get on the red. Can I get on the red?

subtitles.original: Okay, I'm moving my chest, chest piece, which is myself, to the red. Look at the skirt.
subtitles.english: Okay, I'm moving my chest, chest piece, which is myself, to the red. Look at the skirt.

subtitles.original: It's kind of hard to see. Sorry, sorry!
subtitles.english: It's kind of hard to see. Sorry, sorry!

subtitles.original: Doing my best over here. Maybe it's better to view from the other side.
subtitles.english: Doing my best over here. Maybe it's better to view from the other side.

subtitles.original: So look, this is the stage from 'Die for You' MV.
subtitles.english: So look, this is the stage from 'Die for You' MV.

subtitles.original: And then you can see, if we look this way, it's darkness...
subtitles.english: And then you can see, if we look this way, it's darkness...

subtitles.original: ...and then if we look this way, it's darkness!
subtitles.english: ...and then if we look this way, it's darkness!

subtitles.original: But it's still really cool. Whoa, what was that?
subtitles.english: But it's still really cool. Whoa, what was that?

subtitles.original: It kind of looks like the wall that maybe leads to the hospital, I don't know.
subtitles.english: It kind of looks like the wall that maybe leads to the hospital, I don't know.

subtitles.original: Respectfully, of course. Peace.
subtitles.english: Respectfully, of course. Peace.

subtitles.original: It's so... it's so dark in here. Peace. Peace.
subtitles.english: It's so... it's so dark in here. Peace. Peace.

subtitles.original: I'll... I'll make it work. Hi. Hello.
subtitles.english: I'll... I'll make it work. Hi. Hello.

subtitles.original: It is I, Mori Calliope, and I just...
subtitles.english: It is I, Mori Calliope, and I just...

subtitles.original: ...released a new album. It's my best work so far.
subtitles.english: ...released a new album. It's my best work so far.

subtitles.original: And in Japan, we got number one...
subtitles.english: And in Japan, we got number one...

subtitles.original: ...album on iTunes ranking, yay! For alternative music.
subtitles.english: ...album on iTunes ranking, yay! For alternative music.

subtitles.original: So let's see how much further we can push. Last time I checked in US, it was climbing...
subtitles.english: So let's see how much further we can push. Last time I checked in US, it was climbing...

subtitles.original: ...it was getting high up, but you know there's a lot of stiff competition there.
subtitles.english: ...it was getting high up, but you know there's a lot of stiff competition there.

subtitles.original: So, it's all good. If we don't reach number one, that's fine.
subtitles.english: So, it's all good. If we don't reach number one, that's fine.

subtitles.original: But I'd love for you guys to keep pushing for me,
subtitles.english: But I'd love for you guys to keep pushing for me,

subtitles.original: if you would like to. Spread the word and keep listening in all your favorite places.
subtitles.english: if you would like to. Spread the word and keep listening in all your favorite places.

subtitles.original: Keep enjoying the album, and I will keep making...
subtitles.english: Keep enjoying the album, and I will keep making...

subtitles.original: ...I'll keep doing stuff that only I can do,
subtitles.english: ...I'll keep doing stuff that only I can do,

subtitles.original: like writing Mori Calliope lyrics!
subtitles.english: like writing Mori Calliope lyrics!

subtitles.original: So, yeah. I guess that's about it.
subtitles.english: So, yeah. I guess that's about it.

subtitles.original: I want to give a special thanks to Dead Beats and to staff-san. Itsumo arigatou gozaimasu.
subtitles.english: I want to give a special thanks to Dead Beats and to staff-san. Itsumo arigatou gozaimasu.

subtitles.original: My staff is the best. Please look at the credits so you know who to say thank you to.
subtitles.english: My staff is the best. Please look at the credits so you know who to say thank you to.

subtitles.original: Dead Beats, um, and yeah, post it everywhere.
subtitles.english: Dead Beats, um, and yeah, post it everywhere.

subtitles.original: Thank you, thank you, Dead Beats. I'm reading y'all's comments. 'Eat the camera'?
subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you, Dead Beats. I'm reading y'all's comments. 'Eat the camera'?

subtitles.original: I think that's a bad idea. I think they'll get mad at me if I do that.
subtitles.english: I think that's a bad idea. I think they'll get mad at me if I do that.

subtitles.original: I think... I think it's going to break things. So, anyway, that's the end of the jidori camera.
subtitles.english: I think... I think it's going to break things. So, anyway, that's the end of the jidori camera.

subtitles.original: Um, anyway, we are back here.
subtitles.english: Um, anyway, we are back here.

subtitles.original: So I guess that's... oh, wrong microphone. Like I said, I'm using a headset.
subtitles.english: So I guess that's... oh, wrong microphone. Like I said, I'm using a headset.

subtitles.original: No, no, no. Really, microphone. Trust, trust.
subtitles.english: No, no, no. Really, microphone. Trust, trust.

subtitles.original: But you know, with the technical stuff, there's always a little bit of magic...
subtitles.english: But you know, with the technical stuff, there's always a little bit of magic...

subtitles.original: ...involved, right? In order to get the level of quality that we've got.
subtitles.english: ...involved, right? In order to get the level of quality that we've got.

subtitles.original: Thank you guys always for cheering for me and being excited about my work.
subtitles.english: Thank you guys always for cheering for me and being excited about my work.

subtitles.original: Now, there is no encore because life has no encore. So sorry about that.
subtitles.english: Now, there is no encore because life has no encore. So sorry about that.

subtitles.original: I know there are a lot of songs you guys want to hear me sing.
subtitles.english: I know there are a lot of songs you guys want to hear me sing.

subtitles.original: The good news is, I will be singing them soon for you on my streams.
subtitles.english: The good news is, I will be singing them soon for you on my streams.

subtitles.original: So tune into my streams, and...
subtitles.english: So tune into my streams, and...
